pageIntro: Share your riding experience, product ideas, and issues. Every submission is reviewed by our product and service teams.
title: Tell us about your experience
subtitle: Detailed context helps us reproduce your setup faster.

fields.consent: I agree to share this information so the Tanzanite team can follow up.

placeholders.message: Describe what happened, which product you used, and what you’d like to improve.

upload.prompt: Drop images or click to upload (WEBP/JPG/PNG)

messages.submitted: Thanks! Your submission is queued for review.
messages.membersOnly: Attachments are available for eligible members.
messages.submitError: We could not submit your feedback. Please try again.
